description: Appends new values to a Custom Field with type `select` or `multi-select`.

parameters.name: company_id
parameters.description:
Unique identifier for the company. This parameter accepts both formats:
- **Recommended**: Procore company ID (integer) - Use this for new integrations
- Legacy: LaborChart UUID format (uuid string...

schema.description: Request body for adding new values to a Custom Field.

values.description: List of values to append to the field.
